```{r}
standardize_parameters(ulf_model_putamen_id)
```

*LME: Caudate Nucleus*

```{r}
# lme: caudate nucleus
# predictor: maternal iron deficiency status
# main effects

# model summary

ulf_model_caudate_id <- lmer(total_caudate ~ maternal_preg_adj_brinda_id + log_age + child_sex  + (1 | subject_id), 
              data = ULF_ida_final)

summary(ulf_model_caudate_id)

# beta values

standardize_parameters(ulf_model_caudate_id)
```

**--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------**

**Merging and Saving Plots**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
#install packages if needed

#install.packages("patchwork")
#install.packages("cowplot")

```

```{r}
# figure 2
# repeated measures data availability figure
# HF and ULF samples

library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# remove axis titles AND main plot titles
Figure_2_HF_clean <- Figure_2_HF +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )

Figure_2_ULF_clean <- Figure_2_ULF +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_blank()
  )

# combine side-by-side without legend
combined_plot <- Figure_2_HF_clean + Figure_2_ULF_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# extract legend from original plot
legend_plot <- get_legend(
  Figure_2_HF +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# save combined panels
ggsave(
  "Figure_2_combined.jpg",
  combined_plot,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600
)

# save legend separately
ggsave(
  "Figure_2_legend.jpg",
  legend_plot,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 3: ICV

library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(ggplot2)
# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Remove axis titles & main heading
# -----------------------------
icv_hf_clean  <- icv_hf_group  + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
icv_ulf_clean <- icv_ulf_group + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x and y axes
# -----------------------------
# Shared x-axis (scan_age_months)
common_x_limits <- range(c(icv_hf_group$data$scan_age_months, icv_ulf_group$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

# Shared y-axis (ICV volumes)
common_y_limits <- range(c(icv_hf_group$data$hf_mm_icv, icv_ulf_group$data$mm_hyp_icv), na.rm = TRUE)
# Optional: define nice breaks
common_y_breaks <- pretty(common_y_limits, n = 5)

icv_hf_clean  <- icv_hf_clean  +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

icv_ulf_clean <- icv_ulf_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side (remove legend)
# -----------------------------
combined_icv <- icv_hf_clean + icv_ulf_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_icv <- get_legend(
  icv_hf_group +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution JPGs
# -----------------------------
# Combined panels
ggsave(
  filename = "ICV_combined.jpg",
  plot = combined_icv,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600
)

# Legend only
ggsave(
  filename = "ICV_legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_icv,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 3: Corpus Callosum

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)


# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Remove axis titles & main heading
# -----------------------------
cc_hf_clean  <- cc_hf_group  + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
cc_ulf_clean <- cc_ulf_group + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x and y axes
# -----------------------------
# Shared x-axis (scan_age_months)
common_x_limits <- range(c(cc_hf_group$data$scan_age_months, cc_ulf_group$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

# Shared y-axis (CC volume)
common_y_limits <- range(c(cc_hf_group$data$total_cc, cc_ulf_group$data$total_cc), na.rm = TRUE)
common_y_breaks <- pretty(common_y_limits, n = 6)  # 6 ticks

cc_hf_clean  <- cc_hf_clean  +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

cc_ulf_clean <- cc_ulf_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side (remove legend)
# -----------------------------
combined_cc <- cc_hf_clean + cc_ulf_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_cc <- get_legend(
  cc_hf_group +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution JPGs
# -----------------------------
# Combined panels
ggsave(
  filename = "CC_combined.jpg",
  plot = combined_cc,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600
)

# Legend only
ggsave(
  filename = "CC_legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_cc,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)

```

```{r}
# Figure 3: Caudate Nucleus

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Remove axis titles & main heading
# -----------------------------
caudate_hf_clean  <- caudate_hf_group  + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
caudate_ulf_clean <- caudate_ulf_group + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x and y axes
# -----------------------------
# Shared x-axis (scan_age_months)
common_x_limits <- range(c(caudate_hf_group$data$scan_age_months, caudate_ulf_group$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

# Shared y-axis (Caudate volume)
common_y_limits <- range(c(caudate_hf_group$data$total_caudate, caudate_ulf_group$data$total_caudate), na.rm = TRUE)
common_y_breaks <- pretty(common_y_limits, n = 6)

caudate_hf_clean  <- caudate_hf_clean  +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

caudate_ulf_clean <- caudate_ulf_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side (remove legend)
# -----------------------------
combined_caudate <- caudate_hf_clean + caudate_ulf_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_caudate <- get_legend(
  caudate_hf_group +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution JPGs
# -----------------------------
# Combined panels
ggsave(
  filename = "Caudate_combined.jpg",
  plot = combined_caudate,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600
)

# Legend only
ggsave(
  filename = "Caudate_legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_caudate,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 3: Putamen
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Remove axis titles & main heading
# -----------------------------
putamen_hf_clean  <- putamen_hf_group  + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
putamen_ulf_clean <- putamen_ulf_group + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x and y axes
# -----------------------------
# Shared x-axis (scan_age_months)
common_x_limits <- range(c(putamen_hf_group$data$scan_age_months, putamen_ulf_group$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

# Shared y-axis (Putamen volume)
common_y_limits <- range(c(putamen_hf_group$data$total_putamen, putamen_ulf_group$data$total_putamen), na.rm = TRUE)
common_y_breaks <- pretty(common_y_limits, n = 6)

putamen_hf_clean  <- putamen_hf_clean  +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

putamen_ulf_clean <- putamen_ulf_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = common_y_limits, breaks = common_y_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side (remove legend)
# -----------------------------
combined_putamen <- putamen_hf_clean + putamen_ulf_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) &
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_putamen <- get_legend(
  putamen_hf_group +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution JPGs
# -----------------------------
# Combined panels
ggsave(
  filename = "Putamen_combined.jpg",
  plot = combined_putamen,
  width = 14,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 600
)

# Legend only
ggsave(
  filename = "Putamen_legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_putamen,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 3: Combined
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Remove axis titles & main heading for all combined plots
# -----------------------------
icv_clean      <- combined_icv     + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
putamen_clean  <- combined_putamen + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
caudate_clean  <- combined_caudate + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())
cc_clean       <- combined_cc      + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), plot.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Stack all plots vertically
# -----------------------------
all_brain_regions <- icv_clean / putamen_clean / caudate_clean / cc_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(1,1,1,1)) &  # equal heights
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Extract legend from one of the original plots (e.g., ICV HF)
# -----------------------------
legend_all <- get_legend(
  icv_hf_group +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Save the stacked figure
# -----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "All_Brain_Regions_Combined.jpg",
  plot = all_brain_regions,
  width = 14,
  height = 28,   # make tall to fit all four regions
  dpi = 600
)

# Save the legend separately
ggsave(
  filename = "All_Brain_Regions_Legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_all,
  width = 10,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 5: ICV and corpus callosum

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Clean plots (remove titles if desired)
# -----------------------------
icv_child_clean <- icv_ulf_child + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())
cc_child_clean  <- cc_ulf_child  + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align axes (optional: same x-axis if needed)
# -----------------------------
common_x_limits <- range(c(icv_ulf_child$data$scan_age_months, cc_ulf_child$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

icv_child_clean <- icv_child_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

cc_child_clean <- cc_child_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side (ncol = 2)
# -----------------------------
combined_child <- icv_child_clean + cc_child_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) & theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_child <- get_legend(
  icv_ulf_child +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution plots
# -----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_Child_ICV_CC_SideBySide.jpg",
  plot = combined_child,
  width = 14,
  height = 6,  # adjust width:height for side-by-side layout
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_Child_ICV_CC_Legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_child,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 5: Caudate nucleus and putamen
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Clean plots (remove titles & axis labels if desired)
# -----------------------------
caudate_child_clean <- caudate_ulf_child + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())
putamen_child_clean <- putamen_ulf_child + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x-axis only (scan_age_months)
# -----------------------------
common_x_limits <- range(c(caudate_ulf_child$data$scan_age_months, putamen_ulf_child$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

caudate_child_clean <- caudate_child_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

putamen_child_clean <- putamen_child_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side without aligning y-axis
# -----------------------------
combined_child_caudate_putamen <- caudate_child_clean + putamen_child_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) & theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_child_caudate_putamen <- get_legend(
  caudate_ulf_child +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution plots
# -----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_Child_Caudate_Putamen_SideBySide.jpg",
  plot = combined_child_caudate_putamen,
  width = 14,
  height = 6,  # adjust width:height for side-by-side layout
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_Child_Caudate_Putamen_Legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_child_caudate_putamen,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 6: ICV and Corpus callosum

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Clean plots (remove titles & axis labels if desired)
# -----------------------------
icv_id_clean <- icv_ulf_id + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())
cc_id_clean  <- cc_ulf_id  + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x-axis only (scan_age_months)
# -----------------------------
common_x_limits <- range(c(icv_ulf_id$data$scan_age_months, cc_ulf_id$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

icv_id_clean <- icv_id_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

cc_id_clean <- cc_id_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side without aligning y-axis
# -----------------------------
combined_id <- icv_id_clean + cc_id_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) & theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_id <- get_legend(
  icv_ulf_id +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution plots
# -----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_ID_ICV_CC_SideBySide.jpg",
  plot = combined_id,
  width = 14,
  height = 6,  # adjust width:height for side-by-side layout
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_ID_ICV_CC_Legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_id,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# Figure 6: Caudate nucleus and putamen

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# -----------------------------
# 1️⃣ Clean plots (remove titles & axis titles)
# -----------------------------
caudate_id_clean <- caudate_ulf_id + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())
putamen_id_clean <- putamen_ulf_id + theme(plot.title = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank())

# -----------------------------
# 2️⃣ Align x-axis (scan_age_months)
# -----------------------------
common_x_limits <- range(c(caudate_ulf_id$data$scan_age_months, putamen_ulf_id$data$scan_age_months), na.rm = TRUE)
common_x_breaks <- seq(0, ceiling(common_x_limits[2]/3)*3, by = 3)

caudate_id_clean <- caudate_id_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

putamen_id_clean <- putamen_id_clean +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = common_x_limits, breaks = common_x_breaks)

# -----------------------------
# 3️⃣ Combine side by side
# -----------------------------
combined_id_caudate_putamen <- caudate_id_clean + putamen_id_clean +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) & theme(legend.position = "none")

# -----------------------------
# 4️⃣ Extract legend separately
# -----------------------------
legend_id_caudate_putamen <- get_legend(
  caudate_ulf_id +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 14),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 15)
    )
)

# -----------------------------
# 5️⃣ Save high-resolution plots
# -----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_ID_Caudate_Putamen_SideBySide.jpg",
  plot = combined_id_caudate_putamen,
  width = 14,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)

ggsave(
  filename = "ULF_ID_Caudate_Putamen_Legend.jpg",
  plot = legend_id_caudate_putamen,
  width = 6,
  height = 2,
  dpi = 600
)
```
